_meta.notes: Controls how MetricsCalculator selects and aggregates per-fund metrics. Most fields are about data-quality handling, since the heavy lifting is done at the producer.

_primary_sharpe_horizon_weeks_doc: 12w is the medium-term horizon used as the canonical Sharpe for buy/sell rules. 2w is too noisy; 1y is too slow.
_min_bucket_days_doc: Buckets shorter than this should already be dropped at the producer, but consumer also enforces.
_stale_snapshot_warn_days_doc: Warn if snapshot's as_of_date is older than summary's latest period_end by more than this many days.
_treat_nan_sharpe_as_zero_for_rules_doc: When a Sharpe is NaN (e.g. producer's vol-guard fired), treat as 0 for buy/sell rule evaluation but record data_quality flag for conviction to penalize.
_fee_deduction_horizon_weeks_doc: Used for net_return_after_fee_12w_pct = return_12w_compound_pct - total_fee_pct * (12 / 52). Linear approximation; good enough for development.
